Scenario: Login with valid email and password
Test Steps: 1. Open login page; 2. Enter valid email; 3. Enter valid password; 4. Click Login
Expected Result: User is logged in and redirected to homepage
Notes: Sample data for demo e-commerce application

Test Steps: 1. Open login page; 2. Enter valid email; 3. Enter invalid password; 4. Click Login
Expected Result: Error message is displayed and user remains on login page
Notes: Verify message is clear and helpful

Test Steps: 1. Open registration page; 2. Leave required fields empty; 3. Click Register
Test Data: name: blank; email: blank; password: blank
Expected Result: Required field validation messages are displayed

Scenario: Register with password below minimum length
Test Steps: 1. Open registration page; 2. Enter valid name and email; 3. Enter short password; 4. Click Register
Test Data: name: Demo User; email: demo.user@example.com; password: 12345
Expected Result: Password length validation message is displayed
Notes: Minimum password length is assumed for sample purpose

Test Steps: 1. Open product search; 2. Enter keyword; 3. Submit search

Scenario: Search product with no matching result
Test Steps: 1. Open product search; 2. Enter unmatched keyword; 3. Submit search
1. Open product listing; 2. Select a product; 3. Review product detail page
Expected Result: Product name price image description and Add to Cart button are visible

Test Steps: 1. Click Add to Cart; 2. Open cart page
Expected Result: Product is added to cart with correct name price and quantity

Test Steps: 1. Open cart page; 2. Change quantity from 1 to 2; 3. Click Update
Expected Result: Cart quantity and subtotal are updated correctly

Test Steps: 1. Open cart page; 2. Enter quantity 0; 3. Click Update
Expected Result: Validation message is displayed or quantity resets to minimum allowed value

Preconditions: Cart contains at least one product
Test Steps: 1. Open checkout page; 2. Leave address empty; 3. Fill other required fields; 4. Click Place Order
Expected Result: Address required validation message is displayed

Scenario: Verify order history after successful checkout
Test Steps: 1. Log in; 2. Complete checkout with valid sample data; 3. Open order history
Expected Result: Latest order is shown with order ID date status total and item summary
